leadText: Ralts (Japanese: ラルトス Ralts) is a dual-type Psychic/Fairy Pokémon introduced in Generation III. Prior to Generation VI, it was a pure Psychic-type Pokémon. It evolves into Kirlia starting at level 20, which evolves into Gardevoir starting at level 30 or, if male, Gallade when exposed to a Dawn Stone.

sections.title: Biology
sections.text: Biology [ edit | edit source ] Ralts's eyes seen from below Ralts is a humanoid Pokémon with a white body. It has thin arms and legs that widen toward the feet. There is a wispy extension trailing off the back of its feet, creating the overall impression of a nightgown or oversized dress. Most of its face is covered by green hair that resembles a bowl cut , but a pair of pinkish-red eyes is sometimes visible. There are two flat, red horns on top of its head: a large one toward the front and a smaller one at the back. Ralts uses the horns to read people and Pokémon's emotions. Warm feelings cause its body to warm as well, but it hides if it senses hostility. If its Trainer is in a cheerful mood, Ralts also becomes cheerful and joyous. It is known to inhabit urban areas , but it does not normally show itself to humans. However, when it senses happy feelings, it will approach people. Ralts prefers to hang out with people of cheerful nature more than those with gloomy natures. Regardless, Ralts will show no discrimination to anyone based on age or gender. As mentioned in Pokémon Sleep , when a Ralts is seen smiling in its sleep, that means something good has happened during that day. [ 1 ] Evolution [ edit | edit source ] Ralts evolves into Kirlia , which evolves into either Gardevoir or, if male , Gallade . (For specifics on this Pokémon's Evolution in the games, refer to Game data→Evolution data .) Unevolved Ralts Psychic Fairy → First Evolution Kirlia Psychic Fairy ↗ Second Evolution Gardevoir Psychic Fairy Male only ↘ Second Evolution Gallade Psychic Fighting ↑ Sleep Style Dex

Generation III Hoenn #029 Kanto #— Ruby Ralts senses the emotions of people using the horns on its head. This Pok é mon rarely appears before people. But when it does, it draws closer if it senses that the person has a positive disposition. Sapphire Ralts has the ability to sense the emotions of people. If its Trainer is in a cheerful mood, this Pok é mon grows cheerful and joyous in the same way. Emerald A Ralts has the power to sense the emotions of people and Pok é mon with the horns on its head. It takes cover if it senses any hostility. FireRed It is highly attuned to the emotions of people and Pok é mon . It hides if it senses hostility. LeafGreen Generation IV Sinnoh Pt : #157 Johto #— Diamond It uses the horns on its head to sense human emotions. It is said to appear in front of cheerful people. Pearl Platinum If its horns capture the warm feelings of people or Pokémon, its body warms up slightly. HeartGold The horns on its head provide a strong power that enables it to sense people's emotions. SoulSilver Generation V Unova #— Black If its horns capture the warm feelings of people or Pokémon, its body warms up slightly. White Black 2 If its horns capture the warm feelings of people or Pokémon, its body warms up slightly. White 2 Generation VI Central Kalos #064 Coastal Kalos #— Mountain Kalos #— Hoenn #029 X If its horns capture the warm feelings of people or Pokémon, its body warms up slightly. Y It is highly attuned to the emotions of people and Pokémon. It hides if it senses hostility. Omega Ruby Ralts senses the emotions of people using the horns on its head. This Pokémon rarely appears before people. But when it does, it draws closer if it senses that the person has a positive disposition. Alpha Sapphire Ralts has the ability to sense the emotions of people. If its Trainer is in a cheerful mood, this Pokémon grows cheerful and joyous in the same way. Generation VII Alola #— Kanto #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Generation VII . Generation VIII Galar #120 Isle of Armor #034 Crown Tundra #— Sinnoh #— Hisui #101 Sword It is highly attuned to the emotions of people and Pokémon. It hides if it senses hostility. Shield If its horns capture the warm feelings of people or Pokémon, its body warms up slightly. Brilliant Diamond It uses the horns on its head to sense human emotions. It is said to appear in front of cheerful people. Shining Pearl Legends: Arceus Tends to prefer people with a chipper disposition to those who are gloomy, but it has shown no discrimination with regard to age or gender. Needs more research. Generation IX Paldea #62 Kitakami #57 Blueberry #— Lumiose #087 Hyperspace #— Scarlet The horns on its head provide a strong power that enables it to sense people’s emotions. Violet It is highly attuned to the emotions of people and Pokémon. It hides if it senses hostility. Legends: Z-A If its red horns capture the warm feelings of people or Pokémon, its body warms up slightly. Spin-off games Pokopia #231 Pokopia If its red horns capture the warm feelings of people or Pokémon, its body warms up slightly. sections.title: Pokédex entries
sections.text: Pokédex entries [ edit | edit source ] Episode Pokémon Source Entry AG109 Ralts May's Pokédex Ralts, the Feeling Pokémon. Ralts is the pre-evolved form of Kirlia . It can use the horns on its head to read human emotions. Ralts rarely shows itself to humans, but may occasionally approach when it senses positive or happy feelings.
